**Which project does this PR touch?**
e.g. `src/ask_yogasutra`, or repo-wide

**What does this PR do?**
A clear description of the change and why it's needed.

**How was this tested?**
- [ ] Ran the relevant smoke test / existing test suite
- [ ] Manually ran the app (`streamlit run ...` / `chainlit run ...` / `python cmd_main.py`)

**Checklist**
- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My change doesn't commit large binaries, model files, or secrets
- [ ] I've updated the relevant `README.md` if behavior or setup changed
